MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)

Appearances:
Plaintiff CP III RINCON TOWERS INC, is present. Represented by
Attorney IVY P. TSENG, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant VIRGINIA WARJONE, is present.
Attorney MORRIS W. HIRSCH, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem JIM WEIXEL , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JULY 5, 2011 is vacated.
